body.title: MCP tool rename: cc_send → channel_send pointing at UC (8080)
body.result: Renamed cc_send → channel_send with channel param (default 'shared'). cc_send kept as deprecated alias. .mcp.json local entry fixed 8081→8080 (per-machine already correct). channel_read accepts channel param but no-op until schema upgrade (T-channel-messages-schema ticketed).
body.description: Rename mcp__igor__cc_send to mcp__igor__channel_send and add channel param (default 'shared'). Same for channel_read — add channel param. Point both at port 8080 (utility closet) instead of 8081 (Igor's old server, now deleted). Requires updating the MCP server config/implementation which lives outside the TheIgors repo. Follow-up to T-uc-web-server-refactor.
